---
title: "16.04 won't boot when install second NVMe M.2 disk"
date: 2019-08-03
forum: Hardware
---

### Post by kennytang on 2019-08-03
Hi expert,

Currently i have add another Samsung NVMe M.2 1TB to Ubuntu 16.04 and it halt at below screen. However when i uninstall it then it works as normal (Ubuntu 16.04 install on Samsung NvM2 M2 256)

Any help in this please

---

### Post by TheFu on 2019-08-03
Some motherboards only support 1 NVMe device under specific situations even when they have 2 slots.
Some NVMe slots only support SATA SSDs.
Some dual GPU setups break NVMe support.

**Time to pull out the motherboard manual and hope the Engrish isn't too hard to understand.**

My Asus B450 motherboard has this in the manual:> 
 - M.2_1 supports PCIE 3.0 **x4 and SATA mode M Key** design and type 2242 / 2260 / 2280 storage devices.
 - M.2_2 supports PCIE 3.0 **x4 M Key **design and type 2242 / 2260 / 2280 / 22110 storage devices*.

If Vega GPU is built into the CPU, then the M.2_2 socket cannot be used.

---
